webSearch.apiKey.label: Baidu AppBuilder API Key
webSearch.apiKey.help: Baidu AppBuilder API key for intelligent web search generation (fallback: APPBUILDER_API_KEY or APPBUILDER_TOKEN env var).

webSearch.baseUrl.label: Baidu AppBuilder Base URL
webSearch.baseUrl.help: Baidu AppBuilder AI Search API base URL override.

webSearch.model.label: Baidu AI Search Model
webSearch.model.help: Model used for Baidu intelligent search generation over live web results. Default: ernie-4.5-turbo-32k.

webSearch.enableDeepSearch.label: Enable Deep Search
webSearch.enableDeepSearch.help: Enable Baidu deep search to expand retrieval depth before synthesis.
